<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Exceptions; use InvalidArgumentException; use NunoMaduro\Collision\Contracts\RenderlessEditor; use NunoMaduro\Collision\Contracts\RenderlessTrace; use Symfony\Component\Console\Exception\ExceptionInterface; /** * @internal */ final class DatasetDoesNotExist extends InvalidArgumentException implements ExceptionInterface, RenderlessEditor, RenderlessTrace { /** * Creates a new Exception instance. */ public function __construct(string $name) { parent::__construct(sprintf("A dataset with the name `%s` does not exist. You can create it using `dataset('%s', ['a', 'b']);`.", $name, $name)); } }
